title: Spaceballs
description: May the Schwartz be with you.

title: Ford v Ferrari
description: The true story of the 1966 Le Mans race.

title: Office Space
description: It's not that I'm lazy, it's that I just don't care.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
description: A young Viking befriends a Night Fury.

title: Tom & Jerry: The Movie
description: The cat-and-mouse duo on a feature-length adventure.

title: Rush
description: The 1976 F1 rivalry of James Hunt and Niki Lauda.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
description: The live-action adaptation of the beloved animated series. Aang, Katara, Sokka, and Zuko — on the big screen.

title: Baby Driver
description: A getaway driver with a hearing condition uses music to drown out the noise. Edgar Wright at his most kinetic. One of the best soundtracks ever committed to film.

title: Blade Runner: The Final Cut
description: The definitive version of Ridley Scott's neo-noir sci-fi masterpiece. Harrison Ford hunts replicants in a rain-soaked dystopian Los Angeles. Stunning.

title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
description: King Arthur and his knights quest for the Holy Grail. Possibly the funniest film ever made. None shall pass.

title: The Martian
description: Extended cut. Matt Damon gets stranded on Mars and decides to science the hell out of it. Genuinely funny, genuinely tense.

title: Tokyo Mater
description: Mater goes to Tokyo and drifts. A short but perfectly sized pit stop between features.
